subject: Release notes + push v0.7.0 + v0.7.1
outcome: fathomdb 0.7.1 published to crates.io + PyPI + npm + GitHub release. v0.7.0 intentionally NOT published (held as a local historical marker per HITL); 0.7.1 is the first published 0.7.x.

v0.7.1.note: Re-cut twice: first onto the release-consistent tip (074a3f4), then force-moved to the publish-tier-order fix (c893d8b) after the first publish attempt partial-failed.

v0.7.0.note: NOT pushed/published per HITL decision. Its tree predates the finalized CHANGELOG/version (python/ts at 0.6.1, no 0.7.0 CHANGELOG section) so it cannot pass the release-gate preflight; left as a local historical marker.

codex_review.pass1: BLOCK — version bump missed the [workspace.dependencies] Axis-W sibling pins (a 0.7.1 publish would declare 0.7.0 sibling deps). FIXED via scripts/set-version.sh --workspace 0.7.1 (also covered python/ts 0.6.1->0.7.1). NOT overridden.
codex_review.pass2: CONCERN — cut-before-push publish wording. ADDRESSED: publish claims tied to the push; dated section retained per changelog convention.

hitl_gates.decision: Push main only, then dry-run rehearse v0.7.1 publish before any real tag push.
Do NOT publish v0.7.0; 0.7.1 is the first published 0.7.x.
Yes — push v0.7.1, publish for real.
hitl_gates.quote: Yes — push v0.7.1, publish for real

release_runs.detail: Builds + cargo tiers t1-t3 succeeded (schema 0.7.1, query 0.7.1 UPLOADED to crates.io — irreversible; embedder-api 0.6.0 skipped). t4-engine FAILED: engine requires fathomdb-embedder ^0.7.1 not yet on the index (embedder was scheduled at t5, after engine). embedder/facade/cli, PyPI, npm, github-release skipped.

All jobs green: 5-platform builds; cargo tiers t1-t7 in corrected order (t1 embedder-api skip, t2 schema skip, t3 query skip, t4 embedder, t5 engine, t6 facade, t7 cli); publish-pypi; publish-npm; post-publish-smoke x3 (crates-cli, pypi-wheel, npm-package); co-tagging-assert; github-release.

dry_run_rehearsal.detail: workflow_dispatch dry_run=true against main; verify-release + builds + cargo/npm dry-runs green; pypi/smoke/github-release skipped by design.

release_unblockers_fixed: clippy::doc_lazy_continuation in PR-9 test docs (pr9_concurrent_embed.rs, pr9_embed_watchdog.rs) — pre-existing, blocked pre-push hook + CI (484042b).
perf-canonical.yml had 13 workflow_dispatch inputs > GitHub max 10 — consolidated 6 SQLite env-knob inputs into one sqlite_perf_env string (13->8); shellcheck SC2163 quieted (365bc54).

release.yml cargo-publish tier order: embedder published AFTER engine despite engine depending on embedder — reordered T4=embedder/T5=engine + rewired facade/pypi/npm needs; dev/design/release.md tier table corrected (c893d8b).

verification.registries_confirmed_via: crates.io sparse index + PyPI/npm JSON API + gh release view

honesty_notes: 0.7.0 recall gap kept in v0.7.0 notes as a known gap on the synthetic fixture; corrected 0.937 framed as a 0.7.1+ datum, not a retroactive 0.7.0 pass.

First publish attempt partial-failed; schema 0.7.1 + query 0.7.1 were already irreversibly on crates.io before the fix. Recovery relied on cargo-publish-if-new.sh idempotency (skip-if-exists), not republish.

v0.7.1 tag was force-moved after the partial publish; the two already-published crates have byte-identical source in the new tree (only CI/docs changed), so no source divergence between the tag and the published crates.
next_slice: PR-5 (corpus-driven test harness) — begins Phase B.
